mapper.select: SELECT c.id, d.id projectRelateId, course_code courseCode, course_name, ifnull(HOUR, 0) courseHours, (SELECT ifnull(sum(learn_hours), 0) FROM xm_course_relation_courseware a LEFT JOIN xm_courseware b ON a.courseware_id = b.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND a.course_id = c.id) learnHours, (SELECT count(1) FROM xm_course_question WHERE course_id = c.id AND is_delete = 0) topicNumber, d.sort FROM xm_course c INNER JOIN xm_project_relate d ON c.id = d.relate_ids WHERE d.is_delete = 0 AND d.type = 2 AND d.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY d.sort
